use_cases: Floating action button that toggles an expandable menu panel with smooth animations
Quick action launcher for adding items, creating content, or accessing tools in SaaS dashboards
Expandable menu component for e-commerce apps to trigger cart additions or wishlist actions
Action trigger for media applications to reveal editing tools or share options
Contextual menu button for fintech apps to access transaction actions or account settings
ai_summary: A floating action button (FAB) component that toggles an animated dropdown menu panel. Features a morphing Plus/X icon with smooth Framer Motion transitions, glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur, and spring-based panel animations. Includes proper accessibility attributes (aria-expanded, aria-controls) and accepts custom children for flexible menu content. Perfect for SaaS dashboards and mobile-first applications requiring quick-action triggers.
